RichText.Text: 1. be involved in the wonderful world of words involve doing sth. 2. be faced with a difficult situation face a difficult situation （face vt.） 3. be widely praised by the masses for... 4. the ancient bridge being repaired at present 5. take...into account/consideration all factors taken into account 6. be trapped/stuck/caught in... trap-trapped stick-stuck catch-caught 7. pay a visit to ... (pay-paid-paid-paying) 8. offer an unforgettable opportunity to do sth. 9. through hand-on exhibits and live shows 10. inspire lifelong learning 11. get discounted field trip rates 12. follow posted rules strictly strictly observe related rules

TextRun.Text: 面临困境（face 及物动词）
综合所有因素/把所有因素考虑在内

RichText.Text: 1. 参与在精彩文字世界里； 包含/涉及做某事 2. 身陷/面对困境 面临困境（face 及物动词） 3. 因…… 广受大众赞誉 4. 目前正在修缮的古桥 5. 把…… 考虑在内； 综合所有因素/把所有因素考虑在内 6. 被困于……；陷入... trap-trapped stick-stuck catch-caught 7. 参观、拜访 pay-paid-paid-paying 8. 提供难得难忘的做事机会 9. 通过实操展品与现场的展演 10. 激发终身学习意识 11. 享受实地研学优惠/打折的票价 12. 严格的遵守公示的/发布的规章； 严格遵守相关条例
